generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor that measures the gantry crane's carriage position along the rails, read by the Physical Crane Interface Python program."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor that measures the velocity of the crane carriage, obtained via the Physical Crane Interface."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneLoadSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor that measures the load (weight of the interchangeable puck) carried by the crane, accessed by the Python interface."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LoadDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneControllerStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Component that reads the controller unit's state variables (motor commands, set‑points) through the Physical Crane Interface."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CADModelSourceComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Component that provides the detailed CAD representation of the crane geometry for the CAD service."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CADModelDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction – DataTransmitted
instance PositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance VelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneVelocitySensor
]

instance LoadDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneLoadSensor
]

instance ControllerStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneControllerStateSensor
]

instance CADModelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CADModelSourceComponent
]

// C10: Models/Data (Data instances)
instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of crane carriage positions streamed to the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicEngineEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlOptimizerEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEngineEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplicationEnabler
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of crane carriage velocities."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicEngineEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEngineEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplicationEnabler
]

instance LoadData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded load (puck weight) values during operation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LoadDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlOptimizerEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEngineEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplicationEnabler
]

instance ControllerStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Controller unit state variables (commands, set‑points) captured in real time."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlOptimizerEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEngineEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LoggingApplicationEnabler
]

instance CADModelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Geometric CAD data of the crane structure used by visualization and analysis services."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CADModelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADRepositoryEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance LoggingApplicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python‑level Logging Application that continuously writes incoming crane state data into a TimescaleDB time‑series database."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance VisualizationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine that consumes logged crane data to render interactive visualizations of motion and performance metrics."
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveDataVisualizationService
]

instance KinematicEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real‑time kinematic engine that computes the crane’s pose from sensor streams."
    DTDFVocab:enables KinematicModelService
]

instance ControlOptimizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimization service that computes optimal trajectories for puck transport based on current crane state."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance CADRepositoryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Repository serving the detailed CAD representation of the crane geometry to clients and downstream services."
    DTDFVocab:enables CADRepresentationService
]

instance ValidationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Validation engine that continuously compares live measurements against model predictions to detect deviations."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance CADRepresentationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supplies a detailed CAD representation of the crane geometry to users and downstream applications."
    DTDFVocab:provides CADInsight
]

instance KinematicModelService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes the crane’s pose in real time using the kinematic engine."
    DTDFVocab:provides PoseInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes optimal trajectories for puck transport based on the current crane state."
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputeTrajectoryAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously logs sensor and actuator values into TimescaleDB for historical analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalLogInsight
]

instance InteractiveDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides interactive visualizations of crane motion and performance metrics from logged data."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously validates live measurements against model predictions to detect deviations."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance CADInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the geometric details of the crane for design, analysis, and virtual inspection."
]

instance PoseInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current pose (position and orientation) of the crane derived from real‑time kinematic calculations."
]

instance HistoricalLogInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Aggregated historical view of crane sensor and actuator values for trend analysis."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visual representation of crane motion and performance for operator support."
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of deviations between live measurements and model predictions, indicating potential faults."
]

// C17: Actions
instance ComputeTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Computes an optimal trajectory to transport a puck from its current location to a target destination."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application, also a Python program, generates motion commands (target positions, velocity set‑points, trajectory identifiers) and sends them to the Physical Crane Interface, which translates them into the native controller commands of the crane. Commands are transmitted over the same Python‑level connection to the crane controllers, and execution is confirmed indirectly through the state feedback that the Logging Application records."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The exemplars use an ad‑hoc architecture based on containerization and virtualization; virtual‑machine images host the digital‑twin components, which exchange data through an ActiveMQ message broker and persist measurements in an InfluxDB time‑series database. No commercial digital‑twin framework is employed, and the overall system is assembled from open‑source tools."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained through the AutomationML representation of the building’s structure and behaviour. The exemplar provides three applications—runtime visualization, simulation and prediction—that compare model outputs with live sensor data, offering mechanisms for ongoing validation of the twin’s accuracy and for detecting discrepancies between the physical system and its digital counterpart."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑service communication within the digital twin relies on an MQTT broker for publish/subscribe signalling (standard TCP port 1883). Services such as the Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service and the Grafana Dashboard connect to the broker to exchange messages. Persistent data is stored in a TimescaleDB instance accessed via the PostgreSQL protocol over TCP. All components are packaged as containers and run on a shared host network, forming a flat LAN topology within the laboratory environment."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The architecture is deployed on‑premise in the laboratory, using containerised Python services, a TimescaleDB database and a Grafana dashboard. No cloud platform is referenced; the system runs on local hardware (e.g., a workstation or on‑site server). Deployment details such as scalability mechanisms, redundancy, or high‑availability configurations are not described in the provided documents."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Physical‑world data are collected by a Raspberry‑Pi equipped with sensors and transmitted via the ActiveMQ broker to the twin. The twin model is represented in AutomationML, and the processing pipeline is deployed on Microsoft Azure tools, enabling cloud‑based integration and interoperability with external services."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar utilizes an AutomationML‑based digital twin, indicating adherence to the AutomationML standard for model representation and exchange; no additional industry standards, certifications, or interoperability frameworks are mentioned in the documents."
]
